title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Crompton Greaves - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Crompton Greaves - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!
